challenges.title: Complete HTML+CSS Page
challenges.description: Create a complete HTML+CSS page combining headings (<h1>, <h2>), paragraphs, a link (<a>), and a <style> block with at least two CSS rules setting color and font-family. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a complete HTML+CSS page -->

"""
challenges.test_code: assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should start with ' assert '')[0] assert style_block.count('{') >= 2, 'Should have at least two CSS rule blocks'
hints: This challenge combines everything from previous chapters into one page.
Make sure your <style> block has at least two separate selectors with rules.

challenges.title: Styled Multi-Section Page
challenges.description:
Create a styled page with a
containing links, at least two
elements with headings and paragraphs, an tag, and consistent CSS styling (font-family on body, colors on headings, margin/padding on sections). Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a styled multi-section page -->

"""
challenges.test_code: assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should start with ' assert '')[0] assert style_block.count('{') >= 3, 'Should have at least three CSS rule blocks'
hints: Use <section> to divide your page into distinct content areas.
Apply font-family to the body so all sections inherit the same font.
